title: The Clock Tower Becomes the Key
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on the clock tower becomes the key, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Clock Tower Becomes the Key. Vivi and the crew continue the desperate hunt for the shooter and the bomb as the countdown shrinks. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.
